_comment: Curated source for the per-tier company-context digest (ADR-017). seed-demo.ts turns this into cumulative context/{tier}/_digest.json files (premium includes standard + basic). Titles/descriptions are the always-present signal that tells an assistant what company context exists; keep them short and accurate. Add a row here when you add a company document under demo/context/{tier}/.

documents.title: Company overview
documents.description: Stratum Technologies profile, products, and public FAQ

documents.title: Employee directory
documents.description: Departments, team leads, and staff (including platform engineering leadership)

documents.title: Internal processes
documents.description: Escalation matrix, response times, and internal operating procedures

documents.title: Product roadmap
documents.description: Upcoming StratumFlow features and the quarterly delivery plan

documents.title: Board summary
documents.description: Q2 board meeting notes, decisions, and strategic priorities

documents.title: Competitive intelligence
documents.description: Competitor positioning, pricing, and win/loss analysis

documents.title: Customer accounts
documents.description: Top accounts by ARR, renewals, and account health

documents.title: Financial data
documents.description: Quarterly ARR, revenue by plan, churn, and key SaaS metrics

documents.title: Team metrics
documents.description: Team OKR progress and internal performance metrics
